summary: Comprehensive testing of Premium Features (Trial System, Annual Bundles, Preview Config). All 11 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend Pricing page and LessonPage working correctly with trial badge, global progress bar, and monthly/annual toggle.
critical_code_review_comments: Video player only shows when video is available for user's browser language (EN/FR/AR). This is expected behavior based on media generation system.
AdvancedVideoPlayer has speed control (0.5x-2x) and PiP button implemented correctly in code, but video needs to be available to test interactively.
seed_data_creation: Used existing test user from iteration 9
context_for_next_testing_agent: Premium features fully functional. Trial system gives 3 days free access to lesson 1 videos for new users. Annual bundles offer 33% savings. Preview mode shows 30 seconds for premium content. GlobalProgressBar shows XP, lesson count, and badges. TrialBadge shows countdown for trial users.

api_annual_bundles.details: GET /api/premium/bundles/annual returns starter_annual, pro_annual, elite_annual with 33% savings

api_trial_status_active.details: GET /api/premium/trial/status/{lesson_id} returns trial_active=true for new free user on lesson 1

api_trial_status_expired.details: GET /api/premium/trial/status/{lesson_id} returns is_preview_only=true for expired trial

api_trial_status_premium_lesson.details: GET /api/premium/trial/status/{lesson_id} returns is_preview_only=true with preview_seconds=30 for premium lessons

api_trial_status_paid_user.details: GET /api/premium/trial/status/{lesson_id} returns full access for paid users

api_user_access_summary.details: GET /api/premium/user/access-summary returns subscription_tier, access_level, features, trial info with referral bonus calculation

pricing_page_toggle.details: Monthly/Annual toggle works correctly, shows /mois and /an pricing

pricing_page_savings_badge.details: -33% savings badge visible on Annual button

pricing_page_cards.details: All 4 pricing cards (Free, Starter, Pro, Elite) with data-testid attributes

lesson_page_trial_badge.details: TrialBadge shows 'Essai gratuit' with '2j restants' countdown

lesson_page_global_progress.details: GlobalProgressBar shows Niv. 1, XP, 0/23 leçons, 0%, 0 badges

advanced_video_player_code.details: AdvancedVideoPlayer has PLAYBACK_SPEEDS=[0.5, 0.75, 1, 1.25, 1.5, 1.75, 2] and PictureInPicture2 button
